creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 194413
handbrake-1.1.1.patch

HandBrake 1.1.1 has been released.
Attached 'handbrake-1.1.1.patch' upgrades multimedia/handbrake port.

Fortunately,
`patch-contrib_libbluray_P01-freebsd-configure.patch` has been merged to upstream.

libvpx has been updated to 1.7.0.
On this version, libvpx source archive suffix changed from bz2 to gz.

Please apply to Ports tree.
Thank you.
